title: Case report of a radiator-hinge thermal runaway during one CubeSat deployment test
abstract: We document one radiator-hinge thermal runaway observed during a CubeSat deployment test and show the exact sensor trace, fault sequence, and recovery attempt for the affected unit. Figure 1 shows the sensor trace, Table 1 lists the observed thresholds, and the discussion states the limitation that the report covers one hardware configuration only.
manuscript_text: This case report documents one CubeSat radiator deployment test in which a hinge thermal runaway occurred above the stated threshold. Figure 1 shows the sensor trace and recovery attempt, Table 1 lists the observed thresholds and timing markers, and the manuscript asks whether the event is consistent with the documented fixture configuration rather than making a broad reliability claim. The discussion references the nearest engineering guidance, states the uncertainty around generalization, and records the failure condition for the affected unit.
figures_and_captions: Figure 1. Sensor trace and recovery attempt for the affected CubeSat radiator hinge.
tables: Table 1. Observed thresholds, timing markers, and fixture settings for the reported event.
references: Ref1 engineering guidance for CubeSat deployment anomalies.
Ref2 threshold reporting in deployment-fault investigations.
supplement_or_appendix: Appendix A lists fixture settings and sensor placement for the reported unit.
data_availability: Sensor trace archived in the supplement.
materials_availability: Fixture settings are recorded in Appendix A.
ethics_and_disclosures: The authors declare no competing interests.
